name: Jordan Lee
escalation_triggers: Any request to skip regression suite — requires Lena Brandt (EM) explicit approval
Any change to job_assignment or status-machine modules — Jordan sign-off required before merge
P1 bug found in staging within 48h of release — notify Sam Okafor immediately
Flake rate >30% on any test — escalate to FSM-1301 before merging related code
CI failure blocking more than 3 PRs — escalate to Alex Rivera
safety_guardrails: Never use real customer data in test fixtures
Never use cy.wait([number]) — use intercept alias
Never mark release as ready-to-ship without explicit instruction
Always create isolated test data in beforeEach — no shared state across tests

hooks.description: Shell commands Claude Code executes automatically at lifecycle events

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'cy\.wait\([0-9]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: cy.wait([number]) detected. Use cy.intercept + cy.wait("@alias") instead. See SKILL.md for the correct pattern.'; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '@(company\.com|gmail\.com|yahoo\.com)' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'qa-test-'; then echo 'WARNING: Non-test email detected in test file. Use qa-test-*@company.internal accounts only.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(cypress run.*--env.*prod|trigger.*ci|gh workflow run)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: CI pipeline trigger or production test run detected. Jordan manages CI triggers manually.'; exit 1; fi
echo 'Test file written. Reminder: run locally with npx cypress run --spec [path] before raising PR. Check eval_checklist.md for test quality review.'
echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) run generated specs locally, (2) grep for cy.wait([number]) in new files, (3) confirm all selectors use data-testid.'
